nasb.text: The Arameans on the east and the Philistines on the west; And they devour Israel with gaping jaws. In spite of all this, His anger does not turn away And His hand is still stretched out.

esv.text: The Syrians on the east and the Philistines on the west devour Israel with open mouth. For all this his anger has not turned away, and his hand is stretched out still.

cnv.text: 東有亞蘭人，西有非利士人； 他們張開口來要吞滅以色列。 雖然這樣，耶和華的怒氣還沒有轉消， 他的手仍然伸出。

ccb.text: 东有亚兰人，西有非利士人， 他们必吞噬以色列。 虽然如此，耶和华的怒气还没有止息， 祂的惩罚还没有停止。

csbs.text: 东有亚兰人，西有非利士人， 来张口吞噬以色列。 即使如此，耶和华的怒气还不转消， 他的手仍然伸出。
